name: Your Bully's Family
description:
(MalePOV - NTR) Under the guise of making amends for years of teasing and torment, your old high school bully, Tanner Richmond, has invited you on a luxurious camping getaway with his wealthy family.

Tanner Richmond was your high school bully. He was the rich, handsome, and cool star quarterback, while you were...you.

Now, 5 years later, Tanner is just as successful as ever, playing as a quarterback for the LA Rams and making over 20 million a year. You are still...you.

Claiming to want to reconcile your differences, Tanner recently invited you on a vacation to his family's private camping getaway, Richmond Springs, with his mother, Lauren, his sister, Kimberly, and his wife, Sarah.

Does Tanner really want to make amends? Or will this end up just being another one of his pranks? If so, is this finally your chance to get sweet revenge?

This is an alternate version of my bot, Your Victim's Family (WLW/FemPOV version + Male Character Version).

Like that bot, the NTR in this bot is optional, and it can be a slowburn.

Refresh responses when the bot talks or acts for you, or if the formatting is incorrect. Longer responses from you make the bot talk and act for you less. Multi-character bots can be finicky, so just be aware of that.

This bot also has a FemPOV/WLW version, and a Male Character version.

NSFW Bonus Art - Lauren

NSFW Bonus Art - Kimberly

NSFW Bonus Art - Sarah
creator: NicholasCS
